hero.subtitle: DomRol builds vertical SaaS for industries that still run on WhatsApp. One architecture. Every vertical. White-labeled from day one.

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: A million businesses are stuck.
problem.body: No system. No automation. Just WhatsApp, spreadsheets, and missed revenue.
problem.card1Stat: ~30% of inquiries outside business hours go unanswered.
problem.card1Body: No system means no one captures the midnight message. By morning the customer has booked elsewhere.
problem.card2Stat: One duplicate booking can cost a client relationship.
problem.card2Body: Manual spreadsheets fail under any real load. Two confirmations, one slot, zero trust.
problem.card3Body: 100 orders × €12 average = €360/month paid to a platform that owns your customer relationship.

modules.label: The solution
modules.title: One platform. Every industry.
modules.rentalDesc: Car rentals, yacht charters, villas, motorcycles, bikes, equipment — anything with a name and a daily rate. Every booking automatically confirmed within seconds. 0 lost bookings since launch.
modules.tableDesc: Delivery, takeaway, dine-in — from one admin panel. Your own online ordering page, kitchen kanban display, 2,000+ customers migratable. Pays for itself in month one from Wolt commission savings.

whyDomRol.label: Why DomRol
whyDomRol.title: Built for your industry. Live in 48 hours.
whyDomRol.body: Every industry runs on the same broken stack: WhatsApp, Excel, and prayer. We replaced all three.
col2Items: Designed for no one in particular
col3Items: Your brand, your domain, your data
We deploy it. We maintain it.

testimonials.label: References
testimonials.title: Real businesses. Real results.
testimonials.costaSolQuote: Every inquiry gets a confirmation within seconds. Our customers think we're a much bigger operation than we are.
testimonials.zoldfeszekQuote: We had 2,000 loyal customers but no system to reach them. Now every order is confirmed automatically — our kitchen never misses one.
testimonials.zoldfeszekStat: 2,000+ customers migrated · 0 missed orders · Live since 2026

roadmap.label: Roadmap
roadmap.title: One architecture. Every vertical.
roadmap.body: RentalOS and TableOS are live. Three more verticals ship in 2026.

contact.label: Get started
contact.title: Ready to go live?
contact.body: Tell us which industry you're in. We'll set everything up and have you live within 48 hours.

cta.subtitle: Live in 48 hours. Turnkey setup. No IT team required.

footer.tagline: Every business deserves an operating system. Built in Hungary. Deployed globally.
